source_note: Remaining-2026 US red-folder macro events. Retrieved 2026-06-10. FOMC meeting/decision days from the Federal Reserve FOMC calendar (https://www.federalreserve.gov/monetarypolicy/fomccalendars.htm), direct fetch -- VERIFIED; rate decision 14:00 ET with press conference, SEP as noted. CPI 2026-06-10 and Employment Situation/NFP 2026-07-02 from BLS news-release statements surfaced via bls.gov search of https://www.bls.gov/schedule/news_release/cpi.htm and https://www.bls.gov/schedule/news_release/empsit.htm -- VERIFIED; 08:30 ET. PPI entries are from a bls.gov search snippet of https://www.bls.gov/schedule/news_release/ppi.htm and are UNVERIFIED (verified=false): the BLS schedule pages return HTTP 403 to automated fetch and could not be confirmed directly. CPI releases after 2026-06-10 and Employment Situation releases after 2026-07-02 could NOT be retrieved (bls.gov 403) and are intentionally omitted -- add them manually from the official BLS schedule. BLS warns that 2025/2026 appropriation lapses revised some release dates (https://www.bls.gov/bls/2025-lapse-revised-release-dates.htm); confirm every BLS entry before relying on it. Each event carries per-event 'source' and 'verified'.
